puzzle.title: The Dominion of Wind and Flame
puzzle.intro: Picture a dominion where the wind itself answered to a single ruler, where the voices of the smallest creatures carried weight, and where forces unseen to ordinary eyes were held in careful service. This figure inherited an extraordinary kingdom from a beloved predecessor, wielding power over the elements and the jinn. But great authority came with great tests — and a final moment would reveal something astonishing about the nature of life and death itself.
clues: I inherited a great kingdom from a beloved parent who was also a prophet and servant of Allah.
Allah gave me authority over the wind, sending it on errands of a month's journey in a single morning.
Even the smallest of creatures would speak of my approach, and I would pause to marvel at their awareness.
I commanded a vast army of jinn, humans, and birds, all arranged in orderly ranks before me.
A distant ruler came to test me with a difficult challenge, and I had that ruler's throne brought to my court before the visitor could even rise from a seat.
I remained standing, leaning on a staff, until a small creature of the earth gnawed it through — and only then did those around me realize I had passed.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Prophet Sulayman (Solomon)
Prophet Dawud (David)
Prophet Isa (Jesus)
Prophet Muhammad ﷺ
Prophet Musa (Moses)

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Bringing a distant queen's throne by supernatural means
Being lowered into a deep well as a child
Confronting a tyrant's magicians with miraculous signs
Speaking from the cradle to defend a mother's honor
Receiving the final revealed scripture on a holy mount
trial.answer: Bringing a distant queen's throne by supernatural means

location.label: Key Element
options: A wooden staff gnawed through by a termite
A great ark built to ride out a worldwide flood
A rod that transformed into a serpent before a tyrant
A piece of cloth used to heal the blind
A sacred cave where a revelation was first received
location.answer: A wooden staff gnawed through by a termite

outcome.label: Outcome
options: A noble visiting ruler embraced faith after witnessing signs
A great flood destroyed all but the faithful on an ark
A pharaoh and his army perished in the sea
A righteous companion was lifted to the heavens
A tyrant king and his city were overturned and destroyed
outcome.answer: A noble visiting ruler embraced faith after witnessing signs

puzzle.arabic: وَلِسُلَيْمَـٰنَ ٱلرِّيحَ عَاصِفَةًۭ تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦٓ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّتِى بَـٰرَكْنَا فِيهَا ۚ وَكُنَّا بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَـٰلِمِينَ
puzzle.verse: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind, blowing forcefully, proceeding by his command toward the land which We had blessed. And We are ever, of all things, Knowing. (21:81)
